title: The Most Overlooked $13K/Day Business Anyone Can Start
channel: Chris Koerner on The Koerner Office Podcast
description:
I’m proud to have Bizee sponsor this video. I’ve been using their platform for years to start my LLCs and continue to gain valuable support from their service. It’s a company I genuinely trust and am excited to recommend to you. https://bizee.com/

━
Hunter on X:
⁠https://x.com/HSchenewark
Hunter’s website:
⁠https://417striping.com
Hunter’s guide:
https://startstriping.gumroad.com/l/jabsjk

Hunter Schenewark heard about line striping on this podcast, grabbed a machine, and nine weeks later walked away with nearly $50,000 in revenue,  with zero experience and a beat-up minivan. We met up with Hunter at a church parking lot in action to break down exactly how he did it. Starting with a free job posted on a local Facebook group and a handful of cold emails, he built a pipeline fast enough to have 10 to 12 hour days six days a week in just his second month. We walk through how he prices striping by the line, why seal coating became the real money maker, how he landed a $26,000 job showing up in a minivan, the equipment he bought to get started, and the cold email strategy that brought it all together — no door knocking required.

Enjoy! 
⸻
Audio podcast on all podcast platforms: https://toolkit.tkopod.com/podcast
Free weekly business ideas newsletter: https://tkopod.com
